title: From Multiple Files to God Script
problem: 5-7 requests per page — shell.js, vextreme.js, lang-fab.js, demo-fab.js, scope bundles. Each is a fetch and a potential failure point.
decision: Build-time assembly into one file per page. lib/build-vextreme.js assembles viewmodel + EN strings + feature modules into dist/vextreme-{slug}.js.
lesson: The build script is the assembler. The browser receives the output.
impact: Reduced requests by 80%, eliminated runtime failure points for EN strings.
